程序包 edu.bupt.ta.service

类 ApplicationService

java.lang.Object
edu.bupt.ta.service.ApplicationService
public class ApplicationService extends Object
Provides business-logic operations for job applications. Handles TA application submission, status transitions, and application queries.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • ApplicationService

      public ApplicationService()

  • 方法详细资料

    • apply

      public Application apply(String userId, String jobId)
      Submits a new job application for a TA user. Performs multiple validations before accepting the application: user exists, user is application-ready, job exists, job is OPEN, user's year is within [minYear, maxYear], deadline not passed, vacancy not exceeded, no duplicate application, and active-app limit not exceeded.
      参数:
      userId - the applying TA's user ID
      jobId - the target job ID
      返回:
      the newly created Application record
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any validation check fails

    • getAllApplications

      public List<Application> getAllApplications()
      返回:
      all applications from the CSV

    • findById

      public Application findById(String applicationId)
      参数:
      applicationId - the application ID to look up
      返回:
      the Application, or null if not found

    • getApplicationsByUserId

      public List<Application> getApplicationsByUserId(String userId)
      参数:
      userId - the user ID to filter by
      返回:
      all applications submitted by this user

    • getApplicationsByJobId

      public List<Application> getApplicationsByJobId(String jobId)
      参数:
      jobId - the job ID to filter by
      返回:
      all applications for this job

    • getApplicationsByJobIds

      public List<Application> getApplicationsByJobIds(Set<String> jobIds)
      参数:
      jobIds - the set of job IDs to filter by
      返回:
      all applications whose jobId is in the given set

    • countApplicationsByJobId

      public int countApplicationsByJobId(String jobId)
      参数:
      jobId - the job ID to count
      返回:
      how many applications reference this job

    • countApplicationsByJobIds

      public int countApplicationsByJobIds(Set<String> jobIds)
      参数:
      jobIds - the set of job IDs to count
      返回:
      how many applications reference any job in the set

    • countApplicationsByJobIdsAndStatus

      public int countApplicationsByJobIdsAndStatus(Set<String> jobIds, ApplicationStatus status)
      Counts applications for any job in the given set that have the specified status.
      参数:
      jobIds - the set of job IDs to consider
      status - the status to match
      返回:
      the count of matching applications

    • countTotalApplications

      public int countTotalApplications()
      Returns the total number of applications in the CSV.

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus(String applicationId, ApplicationStatus newStatus)
      Updates the status of an application, using a default note based on the new status.
      参数:
      applicationId - the application to update
      newStatus - the new status
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the application is not found

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus(String applicationId, ApplicationStatus newStatus, String notesOverride)
      Updates the status and optionally the notes of an application. Sets a default note based on the new status if no override is provided.
      参数:
      applicationId - the application to update
      newStatus - the new status
      notesOverride - optional note to replace the default; if null, a default is set
      抛出:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the application is not found

    • deleteApplications

      public void deleteApplications(List<String> applicationIds)
      Removes all applications whose IDs are in the given list from the CSV.
      参数:
      applicationIds - the IDs to delete

    • countUserPendingAndInterview

      public int countUserPendingAndInterview(String userId)
      参数:
      userId - the user ID to count for
      返回:
      the number of active (PENDING or INTERVIEW) applications for this user

    • countAllByStatus

      public int countAllByStatus(ApplicationStatus status)
      参数:
      status - the status to count @return how many applications have this status
